feed.indexTagline: Zviri zvako. Mafambisirwo ako. Mitemo yako.

list.seoDescription: Tsidzira mari kuzviito, humbowo, kana zvinobuda zvauri kuda kukurudzira.
list.heroBody: Tsigira mari kuzviito, humbowo, uye zvibereko. Vanhu vanopindura nemikana yavo, uye nharaunda inopa mubayiro pabasa rinofambisa chinangwa mberi.

card.confirmDelete: Bvisa chitsidziro ichi? Izvi hazvigoni kudzosererwa.

create.seoDescription: Gadzira chitsidziro chemupi kuti ukurudzire chiito chinokosha pa{{appName}}.
create.loginGateBody: Zvitsidziro zviitiko zveNostr zvakasaina. Unoda kupinda muNostr kuti uburitse chimwe.
create.heading: Gadzira chitsidziro
create.title: Musoro
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Tsanangura chiito, humbowo, kana mhedzisiro yauri kuda kukurudzira, zvinofanira kuva muzvirongwa, uye uchazviongorora sei...
create.timezoneNote: Nguva yekutanga neyemugumo zvichaverengerwa munzvimbo yenguva iyi.
create.errorLoginRequired: Unofanira kunge wakapinda kuti ugadzire chitsidziro.
create.errorPledgeInvalid: Mari yechitsidziro inofanira kunge iri USD inopfuura zero.
create.errorPriceUnavailable: Kumirira mutengo weBTC/USD kuti ubatanidze mari yechitsidziro.
create.errorCoverInvalid: Mufananidzo wepamusoro unofanira kuva URL ye https:// chaiyo.

detail.submissionPlaceholder: Govera humbowo, uchapupu, kana basa rapera...
detail.noSubmissionsHint: Iva wekutanga kupindura nehumbowo, uchapupu, kana basa rapera.
detail.trustNote: Chitsidziro ichi chinotsamira pakuvimba. Kufambisa kwemari kunosanganisa mazaps neresiti dzezvipo pamhinduro dzepamusoro.
detail.storyEmpty: Akapa chitsidziro haasati anyora rondedzero yechitsidziro ichi.

list.seoDescription: Wana woziva uye joiner mapoka paNostr
list.heroBody: Gadzira mapoka, unganidza nhengo, uye ramba uchitarisa zviri kuitika munzvimbo dzako.
list.createGroupLoginBody: Kugadzira boka kunoburitsa chiitiko cheNostr kubva muakaundi yako.
list.loginToSeeBody: Mapoka awakatanga kana aunotungamira achaonekwa pano.
list.noGroupsBody: Gadzira boka rako kuti utange kurongedza mishandirapamwe, zvitsidziro, nezviitiko nevanhu vako.
list.noFeaturedBody: Vatungamiri ve{{appName}} vanonyora mapoka akakurumbira pano. Dzoka pasinaapfuura nguva.
list.needsReviewDesc: Mapoka e{{appName}} asati anyorwa kana kuvanzwa. Simudza rimwe kushelf yanokurumbira kana kuriderera nokuvigwa.
list.hiddenDesc: Mapoka akadzvinyirirwa kubva mukuwanikwa pachena. Shandisa menu yekebab pakadhi kuti ubvise kuvanzwa.

home.heroBody: Unganidza Bitcoin yakananga kubva kuvatsigiri vepasi rose. Mupiro mumwe nemumwe unobva wapinda muchikwama chako, pasina vamiririri, pasina kudzoreredza, uye pasina platform inobata mari yako.
home.pendingDesc: Mishandirapamwe iri panetwork isati yatenderwa kana kuvanzwa naani zvake muTeam Soapbox.
home.hiddenDesc: Mishandirapamwe yakabviswa papeji rekutanga reveruzhinji. Shandisa menu pakadhi kuti uibvise pakuvanzwa.
home.yourCampaignsDesc: Mishandirapamwe yako iri panetwork yeNostr uye mipiro inoshanda kuburikidza nemurawu wemushandirapamwe. Inoonekwa papeji rekutanga kana muoni weTeam Soapbox aitenderera.
home.emptyHint: Iva wekutanga kutanga kuunganidza mari pa{{appName}}. Taura nyaya yako, sarudza vanobatsirwa, uchipa rwumwe rwekugovera.

all.title: Mishandirapamwe Yose
all.noMatchHint: Edza zvimwe zvinotsvagwa, kana ubvise kutsvaga kuti uone mishandirapamwe yose.
all.allHiddenHint: Mishandirapamwe yose pamutambo yakavanzwa nevatariri. Vhura «Ratidza dzakavanzwa» kuti uione.
all.emptyHint: Hapana mushandirapamwe wakatumirwa parizvino. Iva wokutanga.

sections.organizersDesc: Sarudza vagadziri venyika vanogona kuomesa zvitumbi pamufuto wenyika.

appearance.title: Maonero
appearance.subtitle: Sarudza kuti app inoonekwa sei.
appearance.intro: Sarudza mode yeruvara waunoda. «System» ichaenderana zvakazvimirira nemamiriro echiedza kana erima emudziyo wako.

network.title: Network
network.subtitle: Marelays ndiwo maserver anochengeta nokuparadzira zviri mukati menetwork yeNostr. Maserver eBlossom anobata kuiswa kwemafaira.
network.connectionsIntro: Tarisira mibatanidzwa yako yemarelays. Marelays maserver anochengeta nokuparadzira zviitiko zveNostr panetwork yose.
network.uploadQualityDesc: «Compressed» inopfupisa mifananidzo mikuru ichisarudza format diki. «Original» inoisa mifananidzo sezvairi.

advanced.title: Zvepamusoro
advanced.subtitle: Mibatanidzwa yechikwama, marongero esystem, nezvimwe zvinotenderwa kuvashandisi venyanzvi.
advanced.intro: Mibatanidzwa yechikwama, marongero esystem, nezvimwe zvepamusoro.

language.title: Mutauro
language.subtitle: Sarudza mutauro unoshandiswa muapp yose.
language.intro: Sarudza mutauro waunoda. App ichachinja ipapo ipapo uye icharangarira sarudzo yako pamudziyo uyu.
language.translationNote: Shanduro dzichiri kuitwa. Mavara asina kushandurwa anozoonekwa muChirungu.

organizers.appointDesc: Ipa muridzi mvumo yekuomesa zvitumbi pamufuto wenyika yakatarwa.
organizers.alreadyOrganizer: Muridzi uyu atova mugadziri wenyika iyoyo
organizers.adminRequiredDesc: Vatariri vechikuva chete ndivo vanogona kusarudza kana kubvisa vagadziri.
